source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า38.png
view_title: ขยาย F10,F12 (10-pile hexagonal cap and 12-pile cap)
schema_note: Same custom-field convention as S-09/S-10. F10 confirmed hexagonal shape here, matching the hexagon drawn on S-03 (pile footing plan) at D-2.

dowel_bar.note: 7Ø16mm + 7Ø16mm printed as two separate straight (non-hooked) leader lines -- read as 2-layer mat, 14 bars total

warnings: F10's cap dimensions are approximate since it's a hexagon, not a simple rectangle -- long axis 1.75m matches the printed dimension chain, short axis 1.20m estimated from the pile spacing pattern shown.
